meta.reproduce_command: PYTHONPATH=. ./venv/bin/python examples/day3_multidevice_demo.py --run transpile_only --suite day1 --sampling-mode random_k --sample-size 4 --sample-seed 1 --transpile-space compilation_only --transpile-devices FakeManilaV2 --out-dir artifacts/day3_smoke
